final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide visual for an automotive brand launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Audi / BMW global launch campaign photography, 2020s automotive CGI reveal visual tradition, Blade Runner 2049 cinematic atmosphere; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a centered title and subtitle layout over a full-bleed background
Subject: must include the car 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop that feels expansive and cinematic — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a powerful, luminous atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a palette aligned with premium automotive brand tonality — exact hues are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: 
Avoid: cluttered layout, low-contrast text, generic stock-photo feel
